title: Comeback Prediction in Professional Esports (League of Legends)
description: Built a Random Forest classification model to predict win-from-deficit outcomes using 150K+ professional esports match records. Improved F1-score by 347% over baseline through feature engineering and model selection.

title: STEM Degree Distribution & Socioeconomic Analysis
description: Analyzed College Scorecard dataset (6,000+ institutions) to investigate the relationship between low-income student enrollment and STEM degree share at U.S. public colleges. Found a statistically significant negative relationship (r = -0.107, p = 0.009).

title: Wildlife Population Trend Analyzer
description: Developed a data pipeline to aggregate and visualize multi-decade wildlife census data for endangered species, surfacing population trend anomalies using time-series decomposition in Python.

title: Animal Shelter Outcome Predictor
description: Built a classification model to predict adoption, transfer, or euthanasia outcomes for shelter animals using intake records from Austin Animal Center. Achieved 82% accuracy with a gradient boosting classifier.

title: DSC 106 Personal Portfolio Website
description: Designed and built a personal portfolio website from scratch using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript as part of DSC 106. Features a responsive layout, dark/light mode toggle, and dynamically rendered project cards from JSON data.

title: SQL Music Library Database
description: Designed a normalized relational database schema in PostgreSQL to manage a music library with artists, albums, tracks, and playlists. Wrote complex queries for genre analytics and listening history aggregation.

title: COVID-19 Vaccination Rate Visualization
description: Created an interactive choropleth map using Plotly and pandas to visualize U.S. county-level COVID-19 vaccination rates over time, with filtering by state and dose type.

title: Penguin Species Classifier
description: Trained a multiclass classification model on the Palmer Penguins dataset to distinguish species by morphological features. Compared logistic regression, KNN, and decision tree performance using cross-validation.

title: Key Club Volunteer Tracking System
description: Built and maintained a Google Forms and Sheets workflow to track volunteer sign-ups and service hours for 100+ members across multiple community events at Arroyo High School.

title: Housing Price Regression Analysis
description: Performed exploratory data analysis and built multiple linear regression models to predict housing prices using the Ames Housing dataset. Applied feature selection, log transforms, and regularization techniques.

title: Web Scraper for Conservation News
description: Built a Python web scraper using BeautifulSoup to collect and aggregate news headlines related to wildlife conservation from multiple sources, storing results in a SQLite database for trend analysis.

title: CAT 3 Survival Guide Website
description: Led a 4-person team to design and launch a project website delivering a UCSD CAT 3 course survival guide. Presented to 30 students and 2 professors, handling project coordination, design decisions, and final pitch.
